sections.description: WordPress-native hotel CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.8.8.13: Hide Add Booking from menu and add Export tab in Settings.
  • 1.8.8.12: Add settings tabs and move import into settings.
  • 1.8.8.11: Replace large calendar Add Booking header button with floating action button.
